Package org.eventb.internal.core.typecheck

package org.eventb.internal.core.typecheck
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.eventb.internal.core
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    InferredTypeEnvironment
    Here we reuse the implementation of type environments, just adding the necessary machinery to take into account an initial type environment.
    SealedTypeEnvironment
    Here we reuse the implementation of type environment, only creating a separate type to guarantee immutability.
    TypeCheckResult
    This class implements most of the algorithm of the type checker and provides the result to clients.
    TypeEnvironment
    Common implementation of type environments used to type check event-B formulas.
    TypeEnvironmentBuilder
    Mutable sub-class of TypeEnvironment providing methods for changing the underlying map.
    TypeUnifier
    This class is used to solve unknown variables in formula's type.
    TypeVariable
    Denotes a type variable used internally by the type-checker.
